title: Crumb & Co. wholesale bakery catalog: prep 12 product photos + InDesign catalog data-merge to a print-ready B2B PDF and hi-res JPEG
one_line_ask: Grade and consistently crop twelve raw bakery product photos, vectorize the Crumb & Co. wordmark, upload the prepped assets, then run the client's authored InDesign catalog template through a data-merge against the wholesale roster CSV to produce a print-ready B2B PDF and a high-resolution JPEG.

issues: Background is off-white rather than fully transparent (acceptable per brief, but not ideal for a PNG source).
Slight rustic texture and minor color cast present (acceptable as per brief).
Background is off-white/cream rather than transparent, but this is an acceptable source-file condition for the designer to fix
Slight rustic/distressed texture on letterforms is present and intentional per brief
Wheat icon is a simplified leaf/grain sprig rather than a highly detailed sheaf, but reads correctly for the brief
Image delivered as a single composite grid rather than 12 individually addressable JPEGs as specified in the brief
Top-right loaf reads more as a standard white sandwich loaf than a distinctly honey whole-wheat loaf (colour and crust texture are very pale/neutral)
Bottom-right blondie could be mistaken for a caramel brownie — salted-caramel character is present but subtle
Slight luminance noise and cool WB cast visible across several panels — acceptable per brief
Minor crumb scatter and parchment wrinkles in several shots — acceptable per brief as deliberate snapshot realism

assets.name: crumbco_catalog_template.indd
assets.note: Client-provided .indd template; represented here as an authored text proxy (binary Adobe format not synthesizable).
